title: Boiled Buttery Crusty Bread Crumbl
description: A buttery and crunchy Tunisian dish featuring red wine vinegar, ideal for a vegetarian-friendly breakfast or snack.
instructions: Coat a baking sheet with olive oil and place it in the preheated oven for 10 minutes.
While the oven is heating up, mix butter, red wine vinegar, and salt together until well combined.
Pour warm water over bread cubes to soak them. Let sit for about 2-3 minutes until they're slightly softened but not mushy.
Remove baking sheet from the oven and place soaked bread cubes on top of it. Brush with some of the butter mixture.
Sprinkle remaining butter mixture evenly over bread cubes, ensuring all pieces are coated.
Bake for about 15-20 minutes or until golden brown. Remove from oven and let cool before serving.
